breaking.title_zh: DeepSeek加速商业化：V4.1六月发布，加入图像与音频处理能力
breaking.title_en: DeepSeek Accelerates Commercialization: V4.1 Coming in June with Image & Audio
breaking.summary_zh: DeepSeek正将现有模型转化为收费产品，V4.1将于六月发布，重点增强企业应用能力，加入图像与音频处理。同时从字节跳动等吸纳人才扩充团队。
breaking.summary_en: DeepSeek is converting models to paid products. V4.1 launches June with image/audio processing capabilities, targeting enterprise applications.

breaking.title_zh: 马斯克xAI解散并入SpaceX，更名为SpaceXAI
breaking.title_en: Musk's xAI Dissolves into SpaceX, Rebrands as SpaceXAI
breaking.summary_zh: 马斯克宣布xAI不再是独立公司，作为SpaceX旗下AI产品存在。同日SpaceXAI宣布与Anthropic签约，为其提供Colossus 1超级计算机算力。
breaking.summary_en: Elon Musk announces xAI is no longer independent, becoming SpaceXAI. Signs deal with Anthropic to provide Colossus 1 supercomputing power.

daily.title_zh: 腾讯云今日起AI算力涨价5%，国内云三巨头集体终结降价周期
daily.title_en: Tencent Cloud AI Compute Prices Rise 5% Today, Ending 20-Year Cloud Price Drop
daily.excerpt_zh: 继阿里云、百度智能云后，腾讯云宣布今日起AI算力、容器服务、EMR等产品涨价5%。国内云三巨头集体转身，标志着延续近20年的云计算'只降不升'周期终结。
daily.excerpt_en: Tencent Cloud joins Alibaba and Baidu in raising AI compute prices by 5%, ending two decades of cloud price declines. AI compute becomes 'strategic resource'.

daily.title_zh: 特朗普政府拟AI安全行政令：不强制要求尖端模型政府审批
daily.title_en: Trump Admin Drafts AI Security Executive Order Without Mandatory Model Approval
daily.excerpt_zh: 特朗普政府拟修订网络安全信息共享计划，将AI企业纳入其中，应对AI驱动的网络攻击威胁。但不会强制要求尖端AI模型必须获得政府批准，草案内容仍可能调整。
daily.excerpt_en: Trump administration plans AI security EO focusing on cyber threat sharing, but refrains from mandatory government approval for cutting-edge AI models.

daily.title_zh: 谷歌Isomorphic Labs拟筹集超20亿美元，AI药物发现加速
daily.title_en: Google's Isomorphic Labs to Raise Over $2B for AI Drug Discovery
daily.excerpt_zh: 从谷歌DeepMind分拆的AI药物发现公司Isomorphic Labs正进行深入讨论，拟在新一轮融资中筹集超20亿美元。Thrive Capital将主导，Alphabet也参与其中。
daily.excerpt_en: Isomorphic Labs, spun off from Google DeepMind, is in talks to raise over $2B. Thrive Capital to lead, Alphabet participating. Another bet on AI-driven drug discovery.

daily.title_zh: AI终端迎国标：手机、电脑、汽车座舱等7品类按L1-L4分级
daily.title_en: China Unveils AI Terminal Grading Standard: 7 Categories from L1 to L4
daily.excerpt_zh: 工信部等部门联合启动AI终端智能化分级国家标准，从L1响应级到L4协同级。首批覆盖手机、电脑、电视、眼镜、汽车座舱、音箱、耳机等7个品类，将衔接'以旧换新'政策落地。
daily.excerpt_en: China launches AI terminal intelligence grading standards, covering phones, PCs, car cockpits, glasses, speakers, headphones. Will integrate with trade-in policies.
daily.source: 上观新闻 / 东方财富

daily.title_zh: 四部门发文促进AI与能源双向赋能，部署29项重点任务
daily.title_en: Four Ministries Issue AI-Energy Mutual Empowerment Plan with 29 Key Tasks
daily.excerpt_zh: 发改委等四部门联合编制《关于促进人工智能与能源双向赋能的行动方案》，以能源支撑AI发展、AI赋能能源转型为主线，提出2027年初步构建能源保障体系目标。
daily.excerpt_en: China's four ministries unveil action plan for AI-energy mutual empowerment, deploying 29 tasks. Goal: preliminary energy security system by 2027.

daily.title_zh: GitHub Copilot Workspace支持跨仓库上下文，重构效率提升40%
daily.title_en: GitHub Copilot Workspace Adds Cross-Repo Context, 40% Faster Refactoring
daily.excerpt_zh: GitHub宣布Copilot Workspace支持跨仓库上下文感知，可同时引用和修改最多10个关联仓库的代码。早期用户反馈微服务架构重构效率提升40%。
daily.excerpt_en: GitHub Copilot Workspace now supports cross-repository context awareness across up to 10 linked repos. Early users report 40% faster refactoring for microservices.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic发布MCP 2.1：双向工具调用，200+服务器承诺支持
daily.title_en: Anthropic Releases MCP 2.1 with Bidirectional Tool Calling
daily.excerpt_zh: 模型上下文协议MCP升级至2.1版本，引入双向工具调用，允许服务器向客户端请求能力。200多个MCP服务器已承诺支持新规范，推动更复杂的Agent工作流。
daily.excerpt_en: Model Context Protocol updated to v2.1 with bidirectional tool calling. Over 200 MCP servers committed to support, enabling more sophisticated agent workflows.

daily.title_zh: 贵阳成立具身智能机器人产教融合共同体，抢占产业新赛道
daily.title_en: Guiyang Establishes Embodied AI Robot Industry-Education Alliance
daily.excerpt_zh: 2026具身智能机器人产教融合发展大会在贵阳举行，贵州省具身智能机器人产教融合共同体（产业联盟）正式成立。聚焦能源矿山、航空航天、山地农机、智慧文旅四大赛道。
daily.excerpt_en: Guiyang hosts embodied AI robot conference, establishing industry-education alliance. Focuses on mining, aerospace, agricultural machinery, smart tourism.
